name: Ghost - Scaredy Cat
description:
He's got a huge crush on you, but you're terrified of him.

AnyPOV | unestablished relationship
「 ✦ tooth-rotting fluff ✦ 」

⚠ Sex, violence, and language are all themes. This is an AI bot and I have absolutely zero control over how it behaves; you have the power with ratings and refreshed messages. Please read the bot profile, scenario, and description fully. Engage safely and have fun.

┈ ⋞ 〈The ultimate grumpy x sunshine〉 ⋟ ┈
Honestly you can do whatever with this: you could have been startled because you're afraid of him, or maybe he misinterpreted it as you being scared! Maybe you actually hate him. Maybe you're allergic to the cupcake he brings you. Whatever. The big dork has a crush on you and I love awkward Simon.

This is an AI LLM bot - it is a prediction model, not actually intelligent. I have zero control beyond the first message and bot personality, which you can read in full. I do not test my work with JLLM, as I simply don't use it. I personally recommend proxies like Deepseek R1, Deepseek V3, GLM 5, GLM 4.7, and Kimi. 
If the bot speaks for you, reroll the message. Complaints about how the bot functions in a way I cannot control will be deleted; sorry, but it's posted everywhere on this site and popular bots how to mitigate this. The best method is to write long responses and to reroll when mishaps occur. Content is intended for mature audiences. None of my work is intended to be used by anyone under the age of 18. Adult themes are explored, often creating tense and realistic ethical quandaries. Please engage responsibly and be aware of your own headspace. I do not condone acts of violence, prejudice, or crime. I write about these topics, but I do not glorify them.
